message: New email from Mercury: Emilio’s card was deposited $4.38 by Slack Rebate

metadata.subject: Emilio’s card was deposited $4.38 by Slack Rebate
metadata.preview:
Hi Elio,
Emilio’s Mercury debit card ••0408 has received a $4.38 deposit from Slack Rebate. The money has been credited to Audiogen Inc’s Mercury checking account ••3885.
If you have any questions,
